title: Zeebe command binding: Error handling improvement
body:
## Expected Behavior

When an incorrect payload is sent to the Zeebe command binding, like the following, a readable error message should be produced.
```
{
"processDefinitionKey": "test-key",
"messageName": "product-message",
"correlationKey": "2",
"timeToLive": "1m",
"variables": {
"productId": "some-product-id",
"productName": "some-product-name",
"productKey": "some-product-key"
}
}
```

## Actual Behavior

When the payload as shown above is sent, the following error is received. This is poor error handling and misleading to users.

```
"Zeebee binding error: Invalid duration"
```

## Release Note

<!-- How should the fix for this issue be communicated in our release notes? It can be populated later. -->
<!-- Keep it as a single line. Examples: -->

<!-- RELEASE NOTE: **ADD** New feature in Dapr. -->
<!-- RELEASE NOTE: **FIX** Bug in runtime. -->
<!-- RELEASE NOTE: **UPDATE** Runtime dependency. -->

RELEASE NOTE:
